title: godep-cruiser v0.2 configuration
description: Dependency rules for Go source trees. Regular expressions use Go regexp syntax.

forbidden.description: Rules whose matches produce violations. Rule names must be unique across forbidden and required.

required.description: Rules requiring every matching source file to import at least one matching dependency. Rule names must be unique across forbidden and required.

allowed.description: Fail-closed allow rules. When present, every dependency must match at least one item. Rule names must be unique within this array.

allowedSeverity.description: Severity of a dependency that matches no allowed rule.

ruleName.description: User-defined rule name. The synthesized allowed-violation name not-in-allowed is reserved.

path.description: Regular expressions matched against the importing file path. Captures supply $1, $2, and later references in to.path and to.pathNot.

pathNot.description: Regular expressions that exclude importing file paths.

orphan.description: Matches files by whether they have no incoming or outgoing dependency.

packageName.description: Regular expressions matched against the Go package clause name.

numberOfDependentsLessThan.description: Matches files whose package has strictly fewer distinct direct local-package dependents. The loader rejects decimal and exponent notation.

numberOfDependentsMoreThan.description: Matches files whose package has strictly more distinct direct local-package dependents. The loader rejects decimal and exponent notation.

path.description: Regular expressions matched against the importing file path. Captures supply $1, $2, and later references in to.path and to.pathNot.

pathNot.description: Regular expressions that exclude importing file paths.

packageName.description: Regular expressions matched against the Go package clause name.

path.description: Regular-expression templates matched against the imported path.

pathNot.description: Regular-expression templates that exclude imported paths.

path.description: Regular-expression templates matched against the imported path, or the module-relative package path when reachable is present.

pathNot.description: Regular-expression templates that exclude imported paths, or module-relative package paths when reachable is present.

reachable.description: Matches packages by transitive reachability in the local dependency graph. True reports reachable targets; false reports unreachable targets.
